diseases.name: Powdery Mildew
diseases.impact: Appears as light yellow spots on mature leaves, spots enlarge with white powdery mycelium, severely affected leaves turn brown, shrivel, and drop.
diseases.solution: Use recommended fungicides at early stages. Remove infected crop residues after harvest.

diseases.name: Downy Mildew
diseases.impact: Angular yellow spots restricted by veins on upper leaf surface. Leaves become chlorotic, eventually necrotic, and host cells die.
diseases.solution: Use recommended fungicides at early stages. Remove infected plant parts after harvest.

diseases.name: Foot Rot
diseases.impact: Temporary wilting, yellowing, wilting, and drooping of leaves. Eventually, the plant dies. Vascular bundles at the base turn yellow or brown. White fungal mycelium visible at the base.
diseases.solution: Destroy infected plants with soil. Improve drainage. Use recommended fungicides at early stages.

diseases.name: Gummy Stem Blight
diseases.impact: Lesions on leaves and fruits, often starting in water-soaked areas. Early stages may have chlorotic holes, then turn light brown and irregular. Dark, cracked, sunken spots on fruits. Sunken, cankerous areas on stems cause plant collapse. Stem lesions often streak, with gum exudation from cracks. Dark brown to black pycnidia visible on fruits, stems, or leaves.
diseases.solution: Deep plowing of crop residues immediately after harvest to reduce fungal survival. Use recommended fungicides at early stages.

diseases.name: Bacterial Wilt
diseases.impact: Sudden wilting of leaves, eventually entire plant wilts. Leaves turn brown and dry. Vascular discoloration (browning). Permanent wilting.
diseases.solution: Destroy infected plants with soil. Crop rotation with resistant varieties (okra, corn). Intercropping with Cruciferae family crops. Avoid moving equipment from infected to uninfected fields.

diseases.name: Leaf Curl Virus
diseases.impact: Upward curling of leaves, shortened internodes, distortion. Stunted plants and deformed fruits.

diseases.name: Papaya Ringspot Virus
diseases.impact: Mottled spots on leaves. Leaf distortion. Fruit distortion and reduced size. Oily spots on fruit surface in severe infections.

diseases.name: Cucumber Mosaic Virus
diseases.impact: Green mottling and leaf distortion. Green spots on fruits, fruits become bright yellow and decayed. Fruit distortion.

diseases.name: Zucchini Yellow Mosaic Virus
diseases.impact: Stunted plants, yellowing, chlorosis (occasionally), mottled distorted leaves (blistering). Fruit discoloration and distortion.

diseases.name: Phytoplasma Disease
diseases.impact: Small, thick, and yellow-green leaves. Shortened internodes and stunted plants. Phyllody (chrysanthemum-like appearance). Virescence (flowers turn green).
diseases.solution: Remove infected plants and control vectors (Leafhoppers) using recommended insecticides.
